UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile information within the PaushtikPath application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user profile.

isVegOnly.description: User's dietary preference for vegetarian-only food items.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

FoodItem.title: FoodItem
FoodItem.description: Represents a specific food item with its nutritional breakdown.

id.description: Unique identifier for the food item.

name.description: The common name of the food item.

calories.description: Total calorie content per standard serving.

MealLog.title: MealLog
MealLog.description: Represents a single instance of a user logging a specific food item.

id.description: Unique identifier for the meal log entry.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who logged this meal.

foodId.description: Reference to the FoodItem that was consumed.

quantity.description: The quantity of the food item consumed.

loggedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the meal was logged.

UserGoal.title: UserGoal
UserGoal.description: Represents the personalized daily nutritional goals set by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user's nutritional goal configuration.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile to whom these goals belong.

targetCalories.description: The user's daily target calorie intake.

targetProteinRatio.description: The target percentage of daily calories to come from protein.

targetCarbsRatio.description: The target percentage of daily calories to come from carbohydrates.

targetFatsRatio.description: The target percentage of daily calories to come from fats.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when these goals were last updated.

definition.description: Stores a user's basic profile information and dietary preferences.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: A master collection of generic Indian food items.

params.name: foodItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific food item.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who logged this meal.

params.name: mealLogId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific meal log entry.

definition.description: Stores a user's personalized daily nutritional goals as a singleton document.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this goal.
